name: Ginger Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking soda, and crystallized ginger.
2. Add the milk, molasses, and egg whites; beat until smoothly blended.
3. Spread batter evenly in a nonstick (or lightly oiled regular) 8-inch square pan.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven until the cake begins to pull from the pan sides and springs back when lightly touched in the center, about 20-25 minutes.
5. Serve warm or cool, cut into about 2-inch squares.
6. Store as directed, preceding.
